title: Captison family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Captisons''' and the '''Thanases''' were an important political family of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], containing several senators and prime ministers.

The Captison family, like the majority of Bakurans, were all adherents of the [[Cosmic Balance|Religion of the Cosmic Balance]]. Of exceptional note among the family were:

*[[Yeorg Captison]], [[Senator/Legends|senator]] and [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|prime minister]]
*[[Tiree Captison]], his wife
*[[Dol Captison]], Yeorg's brother, senator
*[[Marga Captison]], Dol's wife
**[[Ylanda Captison]], Dol and Marga's daughter, beggar
**[[Gaeriel Captison]], Dol and Marga's daughter, senator and prime minister
**[[Pter Thanas]], Gaeriel's husband, commander of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Bakuran garrison/Bakuran Defense Force
***[[Malinza Thanas]], their daughter, member of the [[Bakuran National Symphony]]

==Family tree==
                                   [[Deredith Arden]]
                                         |
                                         + (3 or 4 generations)
                                         |
                               +---------+---------+

 [[Tiree Captison]]---+---[[Yeorg Captison]] [[Dol Captison]]---+---[[Marga Captison]]

                                     |
             (see [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]]) |
                      (adopted)      |

                          [[Malinza Thanas]]
